name: FileObjWriteOptions.PolylineExportType
summary: Determines how polylines will be written to the file

enum_values.name: Bspline
enum_values.summary: Polyline is exported as a degree 1 Bspline (this has been the historical method)

enum_values.name: Single
enum_values.summary: Polyline is exported as a single OBJ "l" object with multiple indices to "v" objects

enum_values.name: Multiple
enum_values.summary: Polyline is exported as multiple OBJ "l" objects, each with 2 indices to "v" objects
